title: Condo Technician
description:
Character and Attitude:

· Willingness to serve the council and to help the residents

· Pleasant and courteous in greeting people

· Think before speaking and listening actively

· Avoid negative speech. Steer clear of gossip, criticism, or negative comments. Focus on positive and constructive communication

· Responsive to enquire and find solutions to improve the situation raised

· Stable and sound character in dealing with people with proper conduct of behaviors

· Mindful with speech and in writing create a more positive and supportive environment for everyone

Job description:

  • Conduct routine inspections on all building services, equipment, and facilities.
  • Attend to emergency service breakdown
  • Attend to enquiries and feedback

· Attend to troubleshooting minor electrical fault, changing bulbs, painting, plumbing and leaking matters.

· Attend and provide support on ad-hoc maintenance.

· Carry out inspection, identify building defects and supervise maintenance and improvement works.

  • Attend to estate festival decorations and preparation works
  • Attend to any site related maintenance matters

Requirement:

  • NTC-2 In Electrical Installation & servicing
  • At least 2 years’ experience and able to work independently.
  • Good work attitude, strong leadership and interpersonal skills
  • Knowledgeable in smart estate app and digital platform preferable.

Position and salary will be commensurate with experience and qualification.

postedCompany.description: Welcome to OneSG Holding Pte Ltd, a leading provider of property management services. Our team of experienced professionals is committed to delivering exceptional service tailored to the unique needs of strata living environments and condominiums. We offer a wide range of customized management services to ensure that our clients receive the highest levels of support in every situation. Contact us today to discover how our tailored property management solutions can meet your specific needs.  OneSG Holding Pte Ltd is a trusted Managing Agent Services company dedicated to providing top-notch property management services. We focus on Mechanical, Electrical & Fire Management, Building Defects & Facade Management, R&R Works & Project Management, and Energy Efficiency Management, establishing ourselves as a reliable partner for property owners. Our highly committed HQ provides business support and technical expertise, while our established procedures and SOPs adhere to market best practices. Our team of experienced and qualified professionals are specialists in their respective fields and knowledgeable in legislations and regulations relating to MCST management and building-related compliances. We value the trust and confidence our clients place in us and endeavor to uphold that trust should we be appointed as Managing Agent for MCST.  OneSG offers a full spectrum of property management services with in-depth knowledge of project management, including water tank maintenance replacement, lift modernization, and other essential asset enhancement initiatives for aging MCST estates.  With years of property management experience, the dedicated staff at OneSG have become true experts in the local Managing Agent Services market with Management Corporation Strata Title, MCSTs.  We believe in Outcome/Performance-Based facility management systems.  As a property management company, we are dedicated to doing whatever it takes to help you achieve your estate goals with professional and digital tools in strata living environments or condominiums.  Learn more about OneSG.
postedCompany.name: ONESG HOLDING PTE. LTD.
